name: IndusInd Platinum Aura Edge Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 3 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on weekends (Saturday & Sunday)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹250 per month
Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 per year)
pros: Low annual fee of ₹700 with easy waiver at ₹1.5L spend
3X reward points on weekend spends is good for lifestyle users
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
cons: Low point value of ₹0.25 per point
idealFor: Weekend shoppers who spend more on Saturdays and Sundays
Budget-conscious users looking for a low-fee card with lounge access
First-time credit card users seeking a mid-tier card

faqs.question: How does the weekend rewards work on the Aura Edge card?
faqs.answer: All purchases made on Saturday and Sunday earn 3X reward points (3 RP per ₹100) instead of the standard 1 RP per ₹100 on weekdays.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹700 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: Does this card offer international lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the Platinum Aura Edge card only offers domestic lounge access (4 visits per year). For international lounge access, consider upgrading to a premium IndusInd card.
